Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules Rose & Shrub video Merchant video Previous page Special formula, high in iron and magnesium Feed your roses and shrubs the nutrients they need for twice as many blooms (versus unfed plants)! Unique blend of 6 nutrients The perfect blend of 6 nutrients and minerals that ensure your plants grow beautiful and bountiful. Feeds plants for up to 6 months Our ‘smart feed’ system releases food only when needed. One feed lasts the whole season. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Rose & Shrub Formula 2 Blend Of 6 Nutrients 3 Feeds For Up To 6 Months 4 Pet & Child Friendly Feeds your roses and shrubs for the entire season with just one application Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub is ideal for all roses whether in pots and containers or beds and borders. No need for constant feeds! Just one application in spring works continuously for 6 months through to the end of the growing season. Specially developed temperature-controlled coating regulates the release of nutrients to when conditions are right for feeding. A blend of essential nutrients to ensure strong, healthy plants all season long. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub? Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub is rich in iron and magnesium, making it ideal for roses and shrubs. Perfect for use on roses and shrubs in pots and containers, beds and borders. When should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub? Only one application required for the entire year. Use between March and September, when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Rose & Shrub? Evenly scatter granules over the compost or soil around your plants following the recommended dosage for plant type on label. Gently work the granules into the soil or mix thoroughly into compost. Water plants as normal. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: General fertilizer safety warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container or label. If inhaled, move to fresh air. For environmental impact considerations, minimize fertilizer runoff by not over-applying and applying when rain is not expected.
